chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.08 of 2012 M/s Al-Ahram Builders (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus C.D.G.K. & others Date Order with signature of Judge For regular hearing. Dated: 24.05.2024 None for appellant. Ms. Soofia Saeed for respondents. -.-.- Against dismissal of a contempt application, as adjudged by the learned Single Judge that no contempt was made out and consequently application was dismissed, aggrieved of it this appeal was filed. However, during pendency of this appeal we have been informed by Ms. Soofia Saeed, learned counsel appearing for the respondents, the suit too met with the same fate when it was dismissed for non-prosecution a year ago and is not restored. In the circumstances, it seems that the appellant has lost interest in the proceedings and perhaps for this reason he is not pursuing this matter. Accordingly instant High Court Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
